title: Square Feet to Square Meters Converter
description: Industrial-grade area conversion tool with precision adjustments, tolerance analysis, and data confidence scoring based on ISO 80000-1 and Six Sigma measurement standards.

inputs.label: Area in Square Feet
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

inputs.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
inputs.businessContext: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

inputs.label: Rounding Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

inputs.label: Include Tolerance Band
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

rules.message: Area must be greater than zero.
Area exceeds maximum allowed value (1,000,000 ft²).
Low accuracy measurements should not be rounded to more than 2 decimal places per ISO 80000-1.

thresholds.message: Low measurement accuracy detected. Consider re-measurement for critical applications.
Large area detected. Verify measurement method (e.g., laser vs tape) to avoid cumulative errors.

formulas.name: Raw Conversion (ft² to m²)
formulas.description: Base conversion using the exact factor 1 ft² = 0.09290304 m² (ISO 80000-1).

formulas.name: Accuracy Factor Determination
formulas.description: Derives a multiplier based on measurement accuracy class to adjust confidence and tolerance.
formulas.formula: accuracy_factor = CASE measurement_accuracy WHEN 'high' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'standard' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'low' THEN 0.85 END

formulas.name: Tolerance Band Calculation
formulas.description: Calculates upper and lower tolerance limits based on accuracy class and area magnitude (per ISO 2768-1).
formulas.formula: tolerance_pct = CASE measurement_accuracy WHEN 'high' THEN 0.01 WHEN 'standard' THEN 0.03 WHEN 'low' THEN 0.05 END; tolerance_value = area_sqm_raw * tolerance_pct; upper_tolerance = area_sqm_raw + tolerance_value; lower_tolerance = area_sqm_raw - tolerance_value

formulas.name: Rounded Conversion Result
formulas.description: Applies rounding precision to the raw conversion value.

formulas.name: Data Confidence Score
formulas.description: Calculates a confidence score (0-1) based on accuracy factor and area magnitude. Higher accuracy and moderate areas yield higher confidence.

formulas.name: Hidden Loss Drivers
formulas.description: Identifies potential sources of error or inefficiency in the conversion process.
formulas.formula: hidden_loss_drivers = [] IF measurement_accuracy == 'low' THEN hidden_loss_drivers.APPEND('Measurement error > 5%') IF area_sqft > 100000 THEN hidden_loss_drivers.APPEND('Cumulative rounding error risk') IF include_tolerance == false THEN hidden_loss_drivers.APPEND('No tolerance band considered')

formulas.name: Suggested Actions
formulas.description: Generates actionable recommendations based on input parameters and calculated results.
formulas.formula: suggested_actions = [] IF measurement_accuracy == 'low' THEN suggested_actions.APPEND('Re-measure using calibrated laser distance meter') IF area_sqft > 50000 THEN suggested_actions.APPEND('Break area into smaller zones for verification') IF include_tolerance == false THEN suggested_actions.APPEND('Enable tolerance band for critical applications')

primary.label: Area in Square Meters
primary.description: Primary converted area value, rounded to the specified precision.

accuracy_factor.label: Accuracy Factor
accuracy_factor.description: Multiplier derived from measurement accuracy class.

upper_tolerance.label: Upper Tolerance Limit
upper_tolerance.description: Upper bound of the tolerance band (if enabled).

lower_tolerance.label: Lower Tolerance Limit
lower_tolerance.description: Lower bound of the tolerance band (if enabled).

rounded_value.label: Rounded Conversion
rounded_value.description: Final value after applying rounding precision.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Measurement Error Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Low accuracy class introduces potential error >5%.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Cumulative Rounding Error Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Large areas may accumulate rounding errors if broken into sub-areas.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: No Tolerance Band Considered
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Without tolerance band, the result may be misinterpreted as exact.

suggestedActions.label: Verify large area by zones
suggestedActions.description: Break area into smaller zones to reduce cumulative error.

suggestedActions.label: Enable tolerance band
suggestedActions.description: For critical applications, enable tolerance to show uncertainty.
